summary: Implement operator-facing settings and management surfaces for organization-scoped master data and teacher access.

steps.name: expand-settings-schema
steps.summary: Expanded organization-scoped settings schema with programs, classes, participants, teacher assignments, invites, and validation coverage.

steps.name: build-master-data-settings
steps.summary: Implemented /settings with organization-scoped queries, server actions, and warm-neutral CRUD flows for villages, programs, classes, and participants.

steps.name: implement-teacher-memberships
steps.summary: Implemented /users with member role management, local-first invite token creation, and teacher-to-class assignment flows plus rule tests.
